name: Premium Cashback Card
description: Offers high cashback rates on dining, shopping, groceries, and daily utility spends. Perfect for everyday retail shopping and restaurant dining discounts.

name: Travel Rewards Card
description: Designed for travel enthusiasts. Earn miles, get airport lounge access, discounts on international flights, and hotel bookings.

name: Fuel Saver Card
description: Save on fuel with surcharge waivers and high reward points at gas stations. Ideal for daily commuters and road trips.

name: Premium Dining & Lifestyle Card
description: Get exclusive access to premium restaurants, food delivery discounts on Swiggy and Zomato, movie tickets, and concert bookings.

name: Supercharger Shopping Card
description: Earn massive cashback on online retail stores, electronics shopping, Amazon, Flipkart, and departmental store purchases.

name: Basic Zero Fee Card
description: A lifetime free card with no annual fee. Get basic rewards on groceries, utility bill payments, and recharge coupons.

name: Globetrotter Luxury Card
description: Elite travel card for US residents. Enjoy premium travel credits, luxury hotel collection perks, and airport lounge access worldwide.
